name: No Bake Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small microwave-safe bowl, place the chocolate chips.
Microwave at high for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes, or until melted and smooth when stirred. Set aside to cool.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese with sugar until smooth.
Add the butter and mix on low speed until blended.
3. Blend in the melted chocolate until fully incorporated.
4. Fold in the thawed whipped topping until well combined.
5. Spoon the cheesecake mixture into the prepared graham cracker crust.
6. Cover and chill until firm.
Source: Back of the Box Gourmet
You can garnish with whipped topping and shaved chocolate.
